globalNews.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
globalNews.summary: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

globalNews.title: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
globalNews.summary: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.

globalNews.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
globalNews.summary: Iran has retaliated against US allies in the region, with Kuwait reporting that a power and water plant had been hit.

globalNews.title: Trump threatens new Canada tariffs over fires sending 'filthy' air into US cities
globalNews.summary: Canadian leader Mark Carney says both the US and Canada have an equal responsibility to fight climate change, which experts say are worsening wildfire conditions.

globalNews.title: Space start-up launches India’s first commercial rocket designed for orbit
globalNews.summary: India's first space-tech unicorn Skyroot Aerospace successfully launched Vikram-1 on Saturday.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Kaspersky identifies malware framework targeting crypto investors
cryptoNews.summary: Cybersecurity company Kaspersky said a newly identified malware framework is targeting cryptocurrency investors through social engineering tactics and trojanized GitHub apps.

cryptoNews.title: French gambling regulator orders ISPs to block Polymarket
cryptoNews.summary: France’s gambling authority has ordered the country’s internet service providers to geoblock Polymarket, citing illegal gambling and market manipulation concerns.

cryptoNews.title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
cryptoNews.summary: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

cryptoNews.title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
cryptoNews.summary: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

aiNews.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
aiNews.summary: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.

aiNews.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
aiNews.summary: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.

aiNews.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
aiNews.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.

aiNews.title: The Zoom hack that says, ‘Don’t record me’
aiNews.summary: If every meeting, watercooler conversation, and date gets transcribed and summarized, who's actually reading any of it?

aiNews.title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
aiNews.summary: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
